questions.text: You find it easy to introduce yourself to other people.
You often get so lost in thoughts that you ignore or forget your surroundings.
You try to respond to your emails and messages as soon as possible.
You enjoy social gatherings with lots of people.
You prefer to stick to routine and familiar places rather than exploring new ones.
You often feel overwhelmed by your emotions.
You enjoy working on creative projects (art, writing, music, etc.).
You prefer to make decisions based on logic rather than feelings.
You enjoy planning things well in advance.
You find it difficult to say no to others.
You enjoy leading groups or teams.
You often question authority and traditional norms.
You find it easy to stay calm under pressure.
You enjoy learning new things for the sake of learning.
You prefer working alone rather than in a team.
You often feel envious of others' success.
You enjoy helping others even at your own expense.
You are always on time for appointments.
You enjoy taking risks and trying extreme activities.
You find it easy to forgive and forget.

personality_types.extrovert: You are an Extrovert! You thrive in social situations, gain energy from being around people, and enjoy being the center of attention. You're likely outgoing, talkative, and enthusiastic.
personality_types.introvert: You are an Introvert! You prefer quiet, low-key environments and need alone time to recharge. You're likely thoughtful, reserved, and enjoy deep conversations over small talk.
personality_types.ambivert: You are an Ambivert! You have a balance of extrovert and introvert traits. You enjoy socializing but also need alone time. You're flexible and adaptable in social situations.
personality_types.imaginative: You are Imaginative! You have a rich inner world, enjoy creative thinking, and often get lost in ideas and possibilities.
personality_types.practical: You are Practical! You focus on facts, reality, and tangible results. You're grounded, realistic, and solution-oriented.
personality_types.creative: You are Creative! You express yourself through art, music, writing, or other creative outlets. You see the world differently and enjoy innovation.
personality_types.logical: You are Logical! You make decisions based on reason and evidence rather than emotions. You're analytical, objective, and systematic.
personality_types.emotional: You are Emotional! You make decisions based on feelings and values. You're empathetic, compassionate, and value harmony.
personality_types.organized: You are Organized! You love planning, structure, and order. You're reliable, disciplined, and goal-oriented.
personality_types.spontaneous: You are Spontaneous! You prefer flexibility and living in the moment. You're adaptable, impulsive, and open to new experiences.
personality_types.leader: You are a Natural Leader! You take initiative, inspire others, and are comfortable making decisions for the group.
personality_types.follower: You are a Supporter! You work well in teams, follow through on tasks, and are reliable and cooperative.
personality_types.curious: You are Curious! You love learning, exploring new ideas, and understanding how things work. You're intellectually driven.
personality_types.calm: You are Calm! You handle pressure well, stay composed in difficult situations, and have good emotional regulation.
personality_types.altruistic: You are Altruistic! You genuinely care about others and often put their needs before your own. You're kind, generous, and empathetic.
personality_types.independent: You are Independent! You prefer to work alone, trust your own judgment, and are self-reliant and autonomous.
personality_types.conscientious: You are Conscientious! You're responsible, organized, and diligent. You take your commitments seriously.
personality_types.adventurous: You are Adventurous! You seek new experiences, love excitement, and aren't afraid to step out of your comfort zone.
personality_types.forgiving: You are Forgiving! You let go of grudges easily, understand human imperfection, and prioritize peace over being right.
